description: Fail-closed paths: unknown topics and malformed states are errors; a state without a rule pack resolves through the conservative safe defaults with the gap named (NFR-14: a fifth state is a config + counsel event, never a silent statutory answer); a registry without its floor/unknown substrate refuses to resolve.

cases.name: an unknown topic is an error, never an empty resolution
a malformed state code is an error, never coerced
CA has no pack: eRx resolves the safe defaults, hard-blocks, and names the missing pack
a registry without the unknown safe-default pack refuses to resolve
a registry without the floor pack refuses to resolve
